infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sacari uses your location to center the course map, measure shot distances, and contribute pin / elevation data to courses you play.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Sacari needs photo access so you can pick a profile picture, upload a 'Find' photo, and set a clan banner.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Sacari saves the round summary card to your camera roll so you can share it.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Sacari uses the camera so you can record your golf swings in slow motion right inside the app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Sacari uses the microphone so you can send voice messages in chats with friends, teammates, and opponents.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Sacari uses the iPhone barometer to measure elevation changes between your ball and the pin so plays-like distance is accurate.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Sacari uses your location to center the course map and measure shot distances.

plugins.photosPermission: Sacari needs photo access so you can pick a profile picture, upload a 'Find' photo, and set a clan banner.
plugins.cameraPermission: Sacari uses the camera so you can snap a 'Find' photo without leaving the app.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: Sacari uses the camera so you can record your golf swings in slow motion right inside the app.
